bank.retain_mission: Extract frontend-development decisions, mobile-app patterns, and platform-specific conventions (incl. WeChat mini-programs).
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the frontend stack, component conventions, target browsers/devices, and recurring UI bugs. Ignore one-off styling tweaks.

mental_models.name: Frontend Stack
mental_models.source_query: What is the frontend stack? Frameworks, build, state, styling conventions.

mental_models.name: Platform Targets
mental_models.source_query: What platforms (web, mobile, mini-program) do we support, and what platform-specific conventions hold?
